title: Planning Graph Domains Definition
description: Schema for grouping Planning Graph nodes into logical domains (health, storehouse, garden, calendar, stability) for UI layout and scoring/weighting.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema declaration for tooling. This is allowed in config files so VS Code can locate this schema.

version.description: Incrementing schema version for the domains config file.

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update to this domains mapping.

description.description: Optional human-readable description of this domains config.

domains.description: Logical groupings of Planning Graph nodes for UI and scoring.

id.description: Stable machine id for the domain (e.g., 'health', 'storehouse').

label.description: Full display label for the domain (e.g., 'Health & Nutrition').

shortLabel.description: Compact label for chips, tabs, or tight UI (e.g., 'Health').

description.description: Narrative description of what this domain represents.

weight.description: Relative weight for scoring/aggregation. Does not have to sum to 1, but is treated proportionally.

ui.description: UI hints for dashboards and visualizations.

accentColor.description: Hex color used for charts, badges, and emphasis for this domain.

icon.description: Icon token/name used by the icon system (e.g., 'heart-beat', 'warehouse').

nodes.description: List of Planning Graph node ids that belong to this domain.

meta.description: Optional arbitrary metadata for this domain (e.g., sorting priority, feature flags, score caps).

examples.description: Groups Planning Graph nodes into logical domains (health, storehouse, garden, calendar, stability) for UI layout and scoring/weighting.

domains.label: Health & Nutrition
domains.description: Body-level health, nutrition, and resilience scores that drive energy, hair/skin, and long-term stability.
